errors.checkout_description: Your cart is safe and nothing has been charged. Please try again — if it keeps happening, contact us and we'll help complete your order.
errors.admin_description: An unexpected error occurred. Try again; the team has been notified with the reference below.
errors.not_found_description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

product.size_chart_intro: The following measurements are body fitted (actual body size in {unit}).
product.size_chart_guide_length: Length: This is the length from the top of the shoulder down to the hem.
product.size_chart_guide_chest: Chest: Place the tape close under the armhole and measure from side seam to side seam.
product.size_chart_guide_hip: Hip: Place the tape approximately 7–9 inches below the natural waistline and measure from side to side at the hip line.
product.size_chart_guide_waist: Waist: This is the narrowest part of the waist. Place the tape from side to side directly at the waistline.
product.size_chart_guide_armhole: Arm Hole: the girth of your arm.
product.size_chart_guide_wrist: Wrist: measure your wrist while keeping the tape somewhat loose so you can be sure your hand will go through the sleeve to reach.
product.size_chart_guide_sleeve: Sleeve: Top of the shoulder down your arm up or until the length you would like to reach as sleeve.
product.size_chart_guide_bottom: Bottom: This is the length of the flare of your dress. Flare is the bottom wide length of your dress.

whatsapp.prefill_message: Hello, I have a question about your products.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.intro: We deliver to all seven emirates of the UAE. Here's everything you need to know about getting your order to your door.
shipping.fees_flat: A flat delivery fee of {flat} applies to every order, anywhere in the UAE.
shipping.fees_free: Enjoy free delivery on orders over {threshold}.

sections.heading: Delivery times
body: Orders placed before 4pm are processed the same business day; orders after that are processed the next business day.
Delivery then takes 1–3 business days depending on your emirate.
items: Abu Dhabi, Al Ain, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah & Umm Al Quwain: 2–3 business days.

sections.heading: Cash on delivery
body: Pay in cash when your order arrives — no card needed. Please have the exact amount ready, as our couriers may not carry change.

sections.heading: Order confirmation
body: After you place an order, we'll reach out on WhatsApp to confirm your details before dispatch. This keeps your delivery smooth and avoids failed attempts.

shipping.track_blurb: Already placed an order? Follow its journey anytime.

returns.title: Returns & Exchanges
returns.intro: Not quite right? We want you to love what you wear. You can return or exchange most items within {days} days of delivery.

sections.heading: Return window
body: You have {days} days from the day your order arrives to request a return or exchange. Reach out before the window closes and we'll take care of the rest.

sections.heading: Condition of items
body: To be eligible for a return, items must be:
items: With all original tags still attached.

sections.heading: Non-returnable items
body: For hygiene and fairness, the following can't be returned:

sections.heading: How to request a return
body: Message us on WhatsApp or use our contact page with your order number and a quick note on what you'd like to do. We'll arrange a pickup or guide you through the next steps.

sections.heading: Refunds
body: Once we receive and inspect your return, we'll let you know it's approved. Cash-on-delivery orders are refunded by bank transfer within 5–7 business days of approval.

sections.heading: Exchanges
body: Need a different size or colour? Let us know and, subject to availability, we'll arrange the swap. If your new choice differs in price, we'll settle the difference with you directly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how S Fashion collects, uses and protects your personal information when you shop with us. We are committed to handling your data responsibly and in line with applicable UAE law.

sections.heading: Information we collect
body: We collect the information you give us so we can process your orders and serve you better, including:
items: Your name, delivery address, phone number and email.
Messages you send us on WhatsApp, email or our contact form.
Basic technical data such as your device type and pages viewed, collected automatically as you browse.

sections.heading: How we use your information
body: We use your information to:
items: Process, deliver and confirm your orders.
Respond to your questions and provide customer support.
Send order updates and, where you have agreed, occasional offers.
Improve our products, website and overall service.

sections.heading: Sharing your information
body: We never sell your personal data. We share it only with the trusted partners that help us run the store — such as delivery companies and payment providers — and only to the extent needed to fulfil your order or as required by law.

sections.heading: Data security
body: We apply reasonable technical and organisational measures to keep your information safe. Access to personal data is limited to staff and partners who need it to do their work.

sections.heading: Your choices
body: You can ask us to access, correct or delete the personal information we hold about you, and you can opt out of marketing messages at any time. Just contact us and we'll take care of it.

sections.heading: Contact us
body: If you have any questions about this policy or how we handle your data, please reach out through our contact page or on WhatsApp.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms & Conditions govern your use of the S Fashion website and your purchases from us. By placing an order, you agree to these terms.

sections.heading: About us
body: S Fashion is an online clothing store operating in the United Arab Emirates. Our trade licence and VAT registration details, where applicable, are shown in the footer of this website.

sections.heading: Orders
body: When you place an order, you are making an offer to buy the items in your cart. We confirm your order once it is accepted and ready to be prepared. We may decline or cancel an order if an item is unavailable, if there is a pricing error, or if we suspect fraud or abuse.

sections.heading: Prices and payment
body: All prices are shown in the currency selected for your market and include applicable VAT unless stated otherwise. We accept the payment methods shown at checkout, including cash on delivery where available. Prices and offers may change at any time, but changes do not affect orders we have already confirmed.

sections.heading: Shipping and delivery
body: Delivery times and fees are described on our Shipping & Delivery page. Estimated delivery times are a guide, not a guarantee, and may vary due to factors outside our control.

sections.heading: Returns and exchanges
body: You may return or exchange eligible items in line with our Returns & Exchanges policy, which forms part of these terms. Please review it before purchasing.

sections.heading: Product information
body: We do our best to describe and picture our products accurately. Colours may appear slightly different depending on your screen, and minor variations between items can occur.

sections.heading: Liability
body: Nothing in these terms limits your statutory rights as a consumer under UAE law. To the extent permitted by law, our liability is limited to the value of the products you purchased.

sections.heading: Governing law
body: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates, and any disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of the UAE courts.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question about an order, a product, or anything else? We're always happy to help.
contact.whatsapp_desc: The fastest way to reach us. Tap below and we'll reply during business hours.
contact.email_desc: Prefer to write? Send us a message and we'll get back to you within one business day.
contact.hours_note: Messages received outside these hours will be answered the next business day.

sections.heading: Our story
body: S Fashion began in the UAE with a simple idea: timeless, elegant pieces that feel made for the women who wear them. We curate every collection with intention — fewer, better things you'll reach for again and again.

sections.heading: What we stand for
body: Carefully chosen fabrics, considered fits, and details built to last beyond a single season. We'd rather earn your trust with quality than chase fleeting trends.

sections.heading: Made for the UAE
body: From Dubai to Fujairah, we design and deliver with our community in mind: quick local delivery, the comfort of cash on delivery, and a real person on WhatsApp whenever you need us.

variants.sync_no_colors: No colour-tagged images to sync from yet.

images.hint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP · large images are optimized automatically
images.error_type: {name}: unsupported type. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
images.error_upload: "{name}" couldn’t be uploaded. Please try again.
images.error_delete: Could not delete image from storage: {error}

ai.analyzing: Analyzing {count, plural, one {image} other {# images}}… detecting colour and copy.
ai.hint: Each image you upload is analyzed — its colour is added as a variant; name and description are filled while empty.

size_chart.use_global_desc: Off to set a size chart just for this product.
size_chart.blank_hint: Leave a measurement blank to hide that column for a row.

validation.slug_invalid: Slug must be lowercase letters, digits, and dashes.
validation.price_invalid: Price must be a valid amount.
validation.cost_price_invalid: Cost price is required and must be 0 or more.
validation.compare_at_invalid: Compare-at price must be a valid amount.
validation.weight_invalid: Weight is required and must be a whole number of grams (0 or more).
validation.variant_unique: Each colour + size combination must be unique.
validation.size_chart_empty: Add at least one size-chart row, or use the global default.
validation.size_chart_size_required: Every size-chart row needs a size label.
validation.size_chart_length_invalid: Enter a valid length for size {size}.

toast.now_visible: Product is now visible to customers.

page.heading: Settings
page.description: Store configuration. Changes apply to the customer storefront immediately.

home_sections.card_description: Reorder and show/hide the sections on the storefront home page, and add your own product rows. The hero banner is always shown at the top.
home_sections.help: Use the arrows to reorder, the switch to show/hide. Add product rows (Best Sellers, New Arrivals, On Sale, …) below. Changes go live immediately.
home_sections.cta_help: Where the “See all” button goes. Leave blank to use the default products filter for the selected source.
home_sections.error_title_required: Give each product section a title (English or Arabic).

hero.card_description: The carousel at the top of the storefront home page. Add one or more slides — each with its own image, bilingual copy, and a button linking to any internal route.
hero.show_help: When off, the storefront shows the product carousel.
hero.empty_state: No slides yet. Add your first hero slide.
hero.upload_prompt: Upload image · JPEG, PNG, WebP · ≤ 8 MB
hero.video_help: Paste a video URL (MP4/WebM). When set, the slide plays this video; the image above is the still fallback (used under reduced motion).
hero.poster_upload_prompt: Upload poster · JPEG, PNG, WebP · ≤ 8 MB
hero.poster_help: Shown before the video loads and as the reduced-motion still. Falls back to the slide image when empty.
hero.ai_idle_hint: Upload a slide image and AI will suggest the eyebrow, headline, subtext, and button label.
hero.button_link_help: Pick a popular product above, or type any internal path — e.g. /products/abaya-noor, /cart, or #shop. The whole slide links here; the language prefix is added automatically.
hero.error_no_slides: Add at least one slide before enabling the hero.
hero.error_missing_image: Every slide needs an image — upload one or remove the slide.

shipping.card_description: Flat fee charged at checkout and the order value above which shipping is free.
shipping.flat_fee_error: Flat fee must be a valid amount.
shipping.threshold_error: Free-shipping threshold must be a valid amount.

contact.card_description: Used by the floating WhatsApp button and the footer.
contact.whatsapp_help: International format with country code, e.g. +971501234567.
contact.email_help: Shown on the contact page. Leave blank to use the default address.
contact.social_help: Shown as icons in the footer. Leave a field blank to hide that icon.

company.card_description: Legal details shown in the storefront footer for UAE compliance. Leave a field blank to hide it.
company.legal_name_help: The legal entity name as it appears on your trade licence.
company.trade_license_help: Issued by your UAE licensing authority (e.g. DED). Shown in the footer.
company.vat_trn_help: 15-digit Tax Registration Number from the FTA. Leave blank if you are not VAT-registered.

grid.card_description: How many product columns the storefront shows at each screen size. Shoppers can still toggle mobile density themselves.
grid.mobile_hint: Shoppers can still switch between {min} and {max} columns on mobile; this sets the default.

size_chart.card_description: Shown in the product size-chart modal. Shoppers can switch between inches and centimetres on the storefront.
size_chart.blank_hint: Leave a measurement blank to hide it for that size (e.g. the free size).
size_chart.size_required_error: Every row needs a size label.
size_chart.length_error: Length for "{size}" must be a valid number.

shipping_return.card_description: Shown in the product page "Shipping & Return" tab. Plain text; line breaks are preserved.
shipping_return.help: This block is shared across every product.

limits.max_items_min_error: Max items must be at least 1.
limits.max_qty_min_error: Max quantity per variant must be at least 1.

ai_model.card_description: The Gateway model powering the admin AI copilot (image suggestions, translate, rewrite). Applies to new requests immediately — no redeploy.
ai_model.label: Model
ai_model.paid_note: Paid-credit models (e.g. Claude) require a top-up on Vercel AI Gateway. Free-tier models work on your monthly free credits — handy for testing.

markets.card_description: Set a flat fee, free-shipping threshold, weight pricing, and delivery window per country. Amounts are in AED.
markets.help: Fees are stored in AED and shown to customers in their own currency. Price per kg applies to parcel weight above the free-weight allowance; set it to 0 to disable weight pricing. Delivery days are business days.
markets.invalid: Please enter valid amounts and a delivery window where max is not below min.

returns.card_description: How many days after delivery customers can request a return or exchange.
returns.window_days_help: Surfaced on the public Returns page. Set to 0 to disable returns messaging.
returns.invalid: Return window must be between 0 and 90 days.

currency.card_description: Enable the currencies you sell in and set the AED→currency rate for each.
currency.help: AED is the base currency (always 1). Customers see prices converted at these rates.

shop_by.card_description: Image tiles on the home page that link into filtered product listings.
shop_by.show_help: When off, the grid is hidden from the home page.
shop_by.empty_state: No tiles yet. Add one to get started.
shop_by.target_help: Or enter a path manually, e.g. /products?on_sale=1.
shop_by.error_no_tiles: Add at least one tile before enabling the grid.
shop_by.error_missing_href: Every tile needs a target link.
